violations.text: Condensation was observed dripping from the top inside surface of the 2-door reach-in cooler. Equipment shall be free of potential sources of contamination. No food items within unit were affected. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2-door reach-in cooler and the large prep unit. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, ice well) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024

Wood is used in the construction of kitchen drying area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

The room with dish machine and walk-in coolers does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Hand sink shall be installed in this area so that it is conveniently located to the dish machine and wear washing area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
Splash Guard shall be installed at hand sink between hand sink and 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023

Flooring near walk-in units is in poor repair. Flooring shall be repaired with a material that is non-absorbent, smooth, durable and easily cleanable. Coving shall be added to the 2 support columns in kitchen. Stone wall near 2 door reach in and oven shall be painted. FRP shall be added to walls behind the two prep tables. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2024
